evidence.snippet: **Our history begins in 1989, a few months before the Berlin wall falls. Since the very start, the focus of DST CONTROL was set on the emerging field of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAV:s). Pretty soon, the focus was even more zoomed in on development and delivery of airborne camera platforms for demanding long-range applications.**

items.notes: OTUS-U series are gyro-stabilised EO/IR camera gimbals for airborne/UAV surveillance applications

evidence.snippet:
*   DST CONTROL AB
*   Gillbergagatan 41c
*   58273 Linköping
*   SWEDEN

**Our history begins in 1989, a few months before the Berlin wall falls. Since the very start, the focus of DST CONTROL was set on the emerging field of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAV:s). Pretty soon, the focus was even more zoomed in on development and delivery of airborne camera platforms for demanding long-range applications.**
OTUS-U200 is the best choice for airborne, maritime and ground-based applications when the trade-off between weight and sensor capability is critical.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Designs and manufactures gyro-stabilised camera gimbals (ISR payloads) integrated onto UAV and other unmanned platforms

evidence.snippet: Completion of a successful blowing sand test of the OTUS-U250 according to MIL STD-810 performed in 2018.

items.name: Hand Control Unit (HCU)
items.product_type: ruggedised handheld gimbal controller with touchscreen

tagline: Swedish supplier of gyro-stabilized EO/IR gimbal sensor heads (OTUS-U family, 135–250 class) and ground control subsystems for tactical UAS. Production-ready across multiple payload weights. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status not publicly disclosed; no named US government contracts identified in open sources.
